creator: martys1oi@att.net
text: This situation occurs when you have both math/octave and cad/kicad installed on your system. The conflict occurs because arpack_ng (from octave) uses mpich and vtk9 (from kicad) uses openmpi. The libraries aren't fully compatible, and we need a way to select between one or the other in both applications. Or the applications need to use function calls that work with both.
